string 2: There! It's Parallelmon!
Why do you try to stop me?
Resistance is futile.

I can see the future.
None may triumph over fate.

If they can see the future, does that mean they
already know the results of this battle...?
If so, then they'll never choose to fight a losing battle, right?

Ah, I understand now. If we were somehow able to
defeat this being that can see the future...

...Then that would be incontrovertible proof
that the future is not set in stone!

Let's do this!
We're all going back—to our own worlds!
You shall pay dearly for this...

I exist across countless worlds...
I am infinite...
We did it!
Whoa!

This Akashic Backdoor is becoming unstable,
now that its keeper has been defeated.

If you don't hurry and get out of there, you might end up
disappearing into some far-flung corner of space-time.
What became of the bubbles?
We must hurry and rescue our partners!
Let's hurry back!

I can still hear their voices...
They're all right!
They tell us to meet them in our original world!
It seems that we're next.
Thank you. You have our gratitude.
No, we should be the ones thanking you!
Without you, we never would've been able to defeat Parallelmon.
We will never forget you!
One day, we will make sure to repay the favor!
They're gone...
Huh...?
I guess it's our turn next.
Wait... {player} isn't glowing.
Does that mean we're from different worlds...?
I wonder if the {player} in our world knows what happened here...

Let's make sure to tell our {player} that this {player}
from another world is also an amazing person.

You should tell the versions of us in your world, too.
Tell them just how great the three of us were together!

I'm not sure about all that, but, in any case...
See you later, {player} from another world!

It looks like this is goodbye.
Thanks again for all your help.

The future we're returning to may be a bleak one,
but I refuse to stop trying to make it better.
I learned that... by watching my dad here.
I wish you luck as well.

And should you ever run into your world's version of me,
please... tell her not to fight with her father.

If you can, of course.
Meanwhile, I'll be praying for peace in your world.

Destiny can be changed.
I'm confident you're the one who can bring it about.
I'm leaving the future to you.

That Akashic Backdoor has been cut off
from the rest of space-time.

It should no longer function as a pathway, meaning
the threat it posed to the laws of reality has passed.
However, Parallelmon can travel across space-time.

That means it's possible that a Parallelmon born in
another timeline could start causing trouble again.

Until then, you'd better rest up. You are sure to
have your work cut out for you again at that point.
For now, though... well done.
